claim_ledger_record.claim_text: The public non-core evidence ledger reports the current manifest chapter-core count.
contradiction_refs: manifest-count-drift: docs/non_core_evidence_ledger.md said All 54 remain at argument while book_structure.json and docs/core_claim_transition_coverage.md record 44 manifest chapter core claims

revision_history.reason: The canonical manifest has 44 active chapter core claims after governed consolidation, so the public non-core ledger count was narrowed to the current manifest count instead of preserving the obsolete 54-count wording.

promotion_blockers: count correction is not evidence for any technical claim
residuals: The contradiction was a public count-surface drift and is resolved by narrowing the ledger to the current manifest count; true chapter-core demotion, deprecation, or refutation remains a future event that requires failed evidence, reviewer findings, prior-art undercutting, or unreproducible replay evidence.
